case_title: SANDY CHA VS. SHAWMAN GROUP, L.L.C. A CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ASSIGN AND TRANSFER TO THE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHA, SANDY AS TO DEFENDANT SHAWMAN GROUP, L.L.C. A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA FLUID BAR & LOUNGE

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHA, SANDY AS TO DEFENDANT SHAWMAN GROUP, L.L.C. A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA FLUID BAR & LOUNGE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CHA, SANDY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHA, SANDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAWMAN GROUP, L.L.C. A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA FLUID BAR & LOUNGE $20,103.21 PRINCIPAL, $280.67 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,683.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
